name: the-grand-design
description: Stephen Hawking and Leonard Mlodinow's The Grand Design — explore the nature of the universe, the laws of physics, quantum mechanics, M-theory, and why the universe doesn't need a creator
useCase: Helps anyone understand modern cosmology — the Big Bang, quantum mechanics, M-theory, and the scientific argument that the universe can create itself from nothing without a creator.
knownRisks: The book presents a specific scientific viewpoint that some may find controversial
